text:
A small girl, Lucy, lived at the edge of a rainforest. She loved the rustling leaves and the sounds of wildlife. One day, while exploring the dense woods with her monkey friend, Charlie, she found something amazing—a hidden cave with a glass dome at its entrance. The glass shimmered with an iridescent light, and for the first time, she saw her reflection.

Enchanted, Lucy peered closer. Her reflection danced with fun, laughing at her curls and freckles. Charlie hopped excitedly, clapping delightedly. Inspired by her beauty, Lucy reached out to touch the glass. Instantly, she was sucked in!

Inside, she found an underground forest shimmering with colors the human eye could only imagine. There were trees with leaves that sang songs when the wind blew and flowers that hummed in harmony. Lucy spent days, then weeks, exploring this secret wonder. She met some shy animals and learned about the rainforest's magic.
